client_request: We need a food delivery platform where customers can browse restaurants, place orders, track delivery status, and pay online. Restaurant owners should manage menus and orders, while admins should oversee users, complaints, and reports. It should work well on mobile and handle heavy traffic during meal times.

projectOverview.clientDescription: We need a food delivery platform where customers can browse restaurants, place orders, track delivery status, and pay online. Restaurant owners should manage menus and orders, while admins should oversee users, complaints, and reports. It should work well on mobile and handle heavy traffic during meal times.
projectOverview.cleanDescription: Develop a comprehensive food delivery platform enabling customers to discover restaurants, place orders, track deliveries, and process payments. The platform must provide restaurant owners with tools for menu and order management, and administrators with capabilities for user, complaint, and report oversight. A key requirement is robust mobile performance and scalability to manage peak traffic during meal times.
projectOverview.businessGoal: To establish an efficient, user-friendly, and scalable food delivery ecosystem that connects customers with restaurants, streamlines order management, and provides effective administrative control, ultimately increasing market share and customer satisfaction in the food delivery sector.

objectives: Enable a seamless customer experience for browsing, ordering, and tracking food deliveries.
Provide intuitive and efficient tools for restaurant owners to manage menus and process orders.
Empower administrators with comprehensive capabilities for user management, complaint resolution, and performance reporting.
Ensure the platform delivers a highly responsive and optimized experience across mobile devices.
Guarantee the system's stability and performance under heavy traffic, especially during peak meal times.

stakeholders.description: Individuals who use the platform to browse restaurants, place food orders, track delivery status, and make online payments.
Businesses and individuals who manage their restaurant's menu, receive orders, and update order statuses via the platform.
Personnel responsible for overseeing all users, managing complaints, and generating operational reports for the platform.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Restaurant Browsing
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow customers to browse and discover restaurants based on various criteria such as location, cuisine type, ratings, and estimated delivery time.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can view a filtered list of restaurants based on cuisine type.
Customers can search for restaurants by name or specific menu items.
Detailed restaurant profiles, including menus, ratings, and operational hours, are accessible to customers.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Order Placement
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable customers to select menu items, customize their orders, add them to a shopping cart, and proceed to checkout.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can add multiple items from a single restaurant to their order cart.
Customers can modify item quantities or remove items from the cart before checkout.
The system displays a clear breakdown of costs (subtotal, taxes, delivery fees) before order confirmation.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Online Payment
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide secure online payment options for customers to complete their food orders.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can choose from at least two common online payment methods (e.g., credit/debit card, digital wallet).
All payment transactions are processed securely using industry-standard encryption protocols.
Customers receive an instant confirmation of successful payment and order placement.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Order Tracking
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow customers to track the real-time status of their placed orders from confirmation through to delivery.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can view the current status of their order (e.g., 'Order Confirmed', 'Preparing', 'Out for Delivery', 'Delivered').
Customers receive real-time notifications (in-app or push) for significant order status changes.

functionalRequirements.title: Restaurant Menu Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow restaurant owners to manage their menus, including adding, editing, and removing menu items, descriptions, prices, and availability.
acceptance_criteria: Restaurant owners can add new menu items with a name, description, price, and category.
Restaurant owners can update the price and availability status of any existing menu item.
Restaurant owners can mark items as 'out of stock' or 'available' in real-time.

functionalRequirements.title: Restaurant Order Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable restaurant owners to receive, review, accept, decline, and update the status of incoming customer orders.
acceptance_criteria: Restaurant owners receive immediate notifications for new incoming orders.
Restaurant owners can view comprehensive details for each order, including customer information and ordered items.
Restaurant owners can change the status of an order (e.g., 'Accepted', 'Preparing', 'Ready for Pickup') via the platform.

functionalRequirements.title: Admin User Oversight
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable administrators to oversee and manage user accounts for all roles (customers, restaurant owners, other admins).
acceptance_criteria: Admins can view a comprehensive list of all registered users across different roles.
Admins can activate, deactivate, or delete user accounts as required.
Admins can reset passwords or update profile information for any user account.

functionalRequirements.title: Admin Complaint Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall provide administrators with tools to review, categorize, and resolve customer and restaurant complaints.
acceptance_criteria: Admins can access a centralized dashboard displaying all submitted complaints.
Admins can assign statuses (e.g., 'New', 'In Progress', 'Resolved') to complaints.
Admins can add internal notes and communicate resolution details to affected parties.

functionalRequirements.title: Admin Reporting & Analytics
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable administrators to generate and view various reports on sales, user activity, and operational performance.
acceptance_criteria: Admins can generate daily, weekly, and monthly sales performance reports.
Admins can view reports on active users, new registrations, and platform usage metrics.
Reports can be exported in common formats such as CSV or PDF.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Mobile Responsiveness
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The platform shall provide an optimized and intuitive user experience that adapts seamlessly across various mobile devices (smartphones, tablets) and screen sizes, ensuring full functionality for all user roles.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Performance under Load
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall support at least 1,000 concurrent active users during peak meal times (e.g., 12 PM - 2 PM, 6 PM - 8 PM) with an average response time of less than 3 seconds for critical operations such as restaurant browsing, order placement, and status updates.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Scalability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The platform's architecture shall be designed to scale horizontally to accommodate a 50% increase in user base and order volume year-over-year without requiring significant redesign or causing degradation in performance or reliability.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Security
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The platform shall implement industry-standard security measures to protect sensitive user data (e.g., personal information, payment details) through encryption, access controls, and regular security audits. It must also comply with relevant data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR, PCI DSS for payment processing).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Availability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The platform shall target an annual uptime of 99.9% (equivalent to less than 8 hours and 45 minutes of downtime per year), excluding scheduled maintenance windows.

assumptions: All users (customers, restaurant owners, administrators) will have reliable internet access to utilize the platform's functionalities.
The project will integrate with existing, reputable third-party payment gateway providers for secure online transactions.
Restaurant owners are responsible for providing accurate and up-to-date menu information, pricing, and availability.
The primary target for mobile access will be devices running current versions of iOS and Android operating systems.

Legal and compliance frameworks related to food delivery (e.g., food safety, consumer rights) will be adhered to by participating restaurants, with the platform facilitating communication but not bearing direct responsibility.
constraints: The platform must be accessible via both dedicated mobile applications (iOS/Android) and a web-based interface for all user roles.
Initial deployment of the Minimum Viable Product (MVP) is targeted within a 6-9 month timeframe from project kick-off.
The platform must integrate with a third-party mapping service for displaying restaurant locations and facilitating potential delivery tracking visuals.
Compliance with local data privacy laws and regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) is mandatory for all handling of customer and business data.
acceptanceCriteria: All core functional requirements for Customers, Restaurant Owners, and Administrators, as outlined in the SRS, are successfully implemented and tested.

The platform demonstrates the ability to handle peak traffic loads during meal times without any reported system outages or significant performance degradation (e.g., response times exceeding 5 seconds).
The mobile user interface provides a consistent, intuitive, and fully functional experience across a representative range of iOS and Android devices.
All sensitive user and payment data stored and processed by the platform are securely protected in accordance with NFRs and industry best practices.
